title: XP Storage - Trinkets
description: An extension mod to add Trinkets support to XP Storage
body:
[![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/GZeDW6Px?logo=modrinth&color=dark_green)](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-control/versions) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/786967180431458355?logo=discord&color=blue)](https://discord.com/invite/eNwkve8k7c) [![GitHub Issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/sf-inc/xp_storage_trinkets?logo=github&color=white)](https://github.com/sf-inc/xp_storage_trinkets/issues) **NO PORT TO FORGE PLANNED!** *(but feel free to port it by yourself and link it)* ***The mod is fully configurable to enable only changes that you like*** # Description This mod aims to improve your gameplay with [XP Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/xp-storage) and [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets), both required of course. In this extension, you can craft **Trinkets** with the magic gem already present in the main mod: **Crystallized Lapis**. This is a short description, full description below. # FAQ - **Does it work on a server?** Yes, it works on a server. File needed for **both** client **and** server - **Can I include it in my modpack?** Yes, you are free to include this mod into your modpack - **For any other things:** Feel free to share your experience, problems, enhancement ideas in the Discord server, or directly creating issues on the GitHub # Full description
Recipes ## XP Conduit - 3 Copper Ingots and 1 Crystallized Lapis - The XP Conduit is a ring, so you can wear it in both mainhand and offhand ring slots ## XP Saver - 3 Strings and 1 Crystallized Lapis. - The XP Saver is an amulet, so you can wear it in necklace slot
How to... ## Use - **XP Conduit:** When you wear it, **75%** of the experience you get will **automatically** be transferred in XP Book(s) from your inventory. However, this has a cost: each experience transferred use your ring until your ring become fully damaged! - **XP Saver:** When you wear it, **50%** of the experience you had before to die will **automatically** be transferred in XP Book(s) from your inventory. However, this has a huge cost: each death use your amulet and make it completely damaged! ## Repair Don't worry! These trinkets don't break, but you'll have to repair them with a new Crystallized Lapis to be able to use their power again. Note that you can repair them even though they're not fully damaged
![Kinetic Hosting Partnership - Use code SFINC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1e36eef33cce33b6b0a7bd2bce1867d0cef6bad_0.webp) [Click Here to Support my Projects](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=850)
